objections.objection_text: I'm terrified of asking the hard questions or provoking confrontation.
objections.underlying_belief: Confrontation results in the loss of safety and the end of the relationship.
objections.underlying_fear: Being abandoned by my primary source of identity if I show my true thoughts.
objections.counter_truth_angle: Confrontation is the portal to genuine safety. If truth kills a relationship, the relationship was an idol with a bad map to begin with.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: I'm terrified of asking the hard questions... You're afraid of that confrontation... resulting in the most important thing in your life leaving.
